'''kodharaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:eolotropic|eolotropic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-dh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eolotropic|eolotropic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kodharaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kodharithi|kodharithi]] || [[word:kodhariji|kodhariji]] || [[word:kodharishi|kodharishi]] || [[word:kodhariki|kodhariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kodharuthuthu|kodharuthuthu]] || [[word:kodharujuju|kodharujuju]] || [[word:kodharushushu|kodharushushu]] || [[word:kodharukuku|kodharukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kodharuthu|kodharuthu]] || [[word:kodharuju|kodharuju]] || [[word:kodharushu|kodharushu]] || [[word:kodharuku|kodharuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kodharufthuf|kodharufthuf]] || [[word:kodharufjuf|kodharufjuf]] || [[word:kodharufshuf|kodharufshuf]] || [[word:kodharufkuf|kodharufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kodharethe|kodharethe]] || [[word:kodhareje|kodhareje]] || [[word:kodhareshe|kodhareshe]] || [[word:kodhareke|kodhareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kodharothotho|kodharothotho]] || [[word:kodharojojo|kodharojojo]] || [[word:kodharoshosho|kodharoshosho]] || [[word:kodharokoko|kodharokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kodharotho|kodharotho]] || [[word:kodharojo|kodharojo]] || [[word:kodharosho|kodharosho]] || [[word:kodharoko|kodharoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kodharofthof|kodharofthof]] || [[word:kodharofjof|kodharofjof]] || [[word:kodharofshof|kodharofshof]] || [[word:kodharofkof|kodharofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kodharïfthïf|kodharïfthïf]] || [[word:kodharïfjïf|kodharïfjïf]] || [[word:kodharïfshïf|kodharïfshïf]] || [[word:kodharïfkïf|kodharïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kodharïfthïfthïf|kodharïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:kodharïfjïfjïf|kodharïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:kodharïfshïfshïf|kodharïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:kodharïfkïfkïf|kodharïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kodharïfthïf|kodharïfthïf]] || [[word:kodharïfjïf|kodharïfjïf]] || [[word:kodharïfshïf|kodharïfshïf]] || [[word:kodharïfkïf|kodharïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kodharïfthïf|kodharïfthïf]] || [[word:kodharïfjïf|kodharïfjïf]] || [[word:kodharïfshïf|kodharïfshïf]] || [[word:kodharïfkïf|kodharïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kodharæthæ|kodharæthæ]] || [[word:kodharæjæ|kodharæjæ]] || [[word:kodharæshæ|kodharæshæ]] || [[word:kodharækæ|kodharækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kodharathatha|kodharathatha]] || [[word:kodharajaja|kodharajaja]] || [[word:kodharashasha|kodharashasha]] || [[word:kodharakaka|kodharakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kodharatha|kodharatha]] || [[word:kodharaja|kodharaja]] || [[word:kodharasha|kodharasha]] || [[word:kodharaka|kodharaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kodharafthaf|kodharafthaf]] || [[word:kodharafjaf|kodharafjaf]] || [[word:kodharafshaf|kodharafshaf]] || [[word:kodharafkaf|kodharafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kodharasha|kodharasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kodharshësha|kodharshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kodharosha|kodharosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kodharmusha|kodharmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kodharyasha|kodharyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokodharnkshësha|gokodharnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokodharnkrosha|gokodharnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokodharnkmusha|gokodharnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokodharnkyasha|gokodharnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kodhadharasha|kodhadharasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kodhadharshësha|kodhadharshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kodhadharosha|kodhadharosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kodhadharmusha|kodhadharmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kodhadharyasha|kodhadharyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokodhadharnkshësha|gokodhadharnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokodhadharnkrosha|gokodhadharnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokodhadharnkmusha|gokodhadharnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokodhadharnkyasha|gokodhadharnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kedhærasha|kedhærasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kedhærshësha|kedhærshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kedhærosha|kedhærosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kedhærmusha|kedhærmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kedhæryasha|kedhæryasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokedhærnkshësha|gokedhærnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokedhærnkrosha|gokedhærnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokedhærnkmusha|gokedhærnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokedhærnkyasha|gokedhærnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kodhfarasha|kodhfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kodhfarshësha|kodhfarshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kodhfarosha|kodhfarosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kodhfarmusha|kodhfarmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kodhfaryasha|kodhfaryasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokodhfarnkshësha|gokodhfarnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokodhfarnkrosha|gokodhfarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokodhfarnkmusha|gokodhfarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokodhfarnkyasha|gokodhfarnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
